1.0.3.en: Updated the apps description and images

1.0.4.en: Added more validations for the settings

1.0.7.en: Paring process updated, fetch in the night updated

1.0.9.en: Fix for the 'device not found' error

1.0.10.en: Added a validation to the current production power

1.0.12.en: Added more validations to the received data

1.0.13.en: Stop fetch interval when the device is unavailable

1.0.14.en: Possible fix for wrong actual power

1.2.0.en: Breaking change: Replaced 'Inverter with Battery' driver with two new drivers: 'Hybrid Inverter (Solar)' (solar panel class) and 'Hybrid Inverter (Battery)' (home battery class) for proper Homey Energy integration. Fixed standard SolPlanet driver energy configuration.

1.2.1.en: Removed deviceNr from pairing, capability fixes

1.2.2.en: Internal restructure, update meter_power to meter_power.total
